news.t: VanEck Announces Year-End Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
VanEck Announces Yearend Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
VanEck Expands Moat Investing Suite With Launch of ETF Targeting Small- and Mid-Cap Moat Stocks

holdings.infoBox: SMOT is an equity ETF with a total of 115 individual holdings. The top holdings are Marvell Technology stock at 3.86%, Datadog at 2.00%, NXP Semiconductors at 1.71%, Akamai Technologies at 1.70%, and Etsy, Inc. at 1.67%.

overview.description: The VanEck Morningstar SMID Moat ETF (SMOT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund tracks an index made up of two equally-weighted sub-portfolios, comprised of small- and mid-cap companies believed to have durable competitive advantages and attractive valuations. SMOT was launched on Oct 4, 2022 and is issued by VanEck.
infoTable: Morningstar US Small-Mid Cap Moat Focus

data.title: VanEck Announces Year-End Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announced today the 2025 annual distributions per share for its VanEck equity exchange-traded funds.

data.title: VanEck Announces Yearend Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announced today the following 2022 annual distributions per share for its VanEck® equity exchange-traded funds.

data.title: VanEck Expands Moat Investing Suite With Launch of ETF Targeting Small- and Mid-Cap Moat Stocks
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck adds SMOT to moat-focused ETF lineup at a time when small-/mid-cap valuations are at 20-year lows relative to large caps.
